channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in Singapore
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Singapore — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Masters of the Universe — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of…

item.title: A Shop for Killers — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · Korean · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — A niece who lost her parents and grew up in the hands of an uncle who runs a shopping mall faces a new truth after her uncle's sudden death.

item.title: The East Palace — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Korean · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

item.title: Road to Success — Viu
item.description: Viu · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — When Lin Wanxing returns to her hometown and takes a job at a local high school, she’s unexpectedly tasked with reviving its long-disbanded soccer team.

item.title: Jana Nayagan — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Tamil · Just released — verdict soon — A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before.

item.title: King of the Hill — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — Set in Texas, this animated series follows the life of propane salesman Hank Hill, who lives with his overly confident substitute Spanish teacher wife Peggy,…

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Kung Fu Soccer — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · Just released — verdict soon — The "Supreme Invincible Cup" is about to begin, and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented showdown!

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.9 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: The Eternal Fragrance — Viu
item.description: Viu · Chinese · Not enough ratings yet — When the Sea Calamity strikes and the Divine Tree appears, whoever claims its fruit gains power over all creation, sparking a bloody war among the immortals,…

item.title: House of the Dragon — HBO Max
item.description: HBO Max · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: The Death of Robin Hood — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last.

item.title: Kokuho — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Japanese · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — Nagasaki, 1964: Following the death of his Yakuza father, 15-year-old Kikuo is taken under the wings of a famous Kabuki actor.
